mapper.select: SELECT STRIFID, STRRESID, STRTYPEMIN, INTTIMESTAMP, INTYEAR , INTMONTH, INTDAY, INTHOUR, INTMIN, INTWEEK , INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN, FLTPPSOUT , FLTERRORIN, FLTERROROUT, FLTDISCARDIN, FLTDISCARDOUT, FLTUNKNOWN , FLTUSAGE, FLHCINOCTETS, FLHCOUTOCTETS, FLHCINUCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, FLTBPSINMAX , FLTBPSOUTMAX, FLTPPSINMAX, FLTPPSOUTMAX, FLTERRORINMAX, FLTERROROUTMAX , FLTDISCARDINMAX, FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, FLTUNKNOWNMAX, FLTUSAGEMAX FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF WHERE INTTIMESTAMP > #{inttimestamp} ORDER BY INTTIMESTAMP

SELECT NODE_NUM, NODE_ID, NODE_NM, MODEL_NUM, MODEL_ID , IP_ADDR, MAC_ADDR, ADMIN_YN, PRIMARY_GB, SNMP_VER , SNMP_COMMUNITY, SNMP_PORT, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, NETCONF_PORT , NETCONF_ID, NETCONF_PW, NETCONF_TYPE, NODE_DIVISION, VENDOR , SFLOW_IP, UP_DATETIME, CHNG_DATETIME, REG_DATETIME, DATA_SOURCE FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST
SELECT NODE_NUM, NODE_ID, IF_NUM, IF_ID, IF_NM, IF_INDEX, IF_DESC, IF_TYPE, IF_SPEED, IP_ADDR, MAC_ADDR FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST

SELECT SRC_NODE_NUM, SRC_NODE_ID, SRC_IF_NUM, SRC_IF_ID, DEST_NODE_NUM , DEST_NODE_ID, DEST_IF_NUM, DEST_IF_ID, LINK_DESC, VLAN , TAG, SRC_IP_ADDR, SRC_MAC_ADDR, DEST_IP_ADDR, DEST_MAC_ADDR , PREFIX, TOPOLOGY, BANDWIDTH, LINK_TYPE, LINK_DIV FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK
